ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Scott Hodges. Daniel Cutter Investment Advisor from Merrill Lynch.

Ms. Alavi stated that there was an annual fee for Wells Fargo, that the problem with Wells Fargo was that the investments were not transparent and had a lot of hidden fees, and that the Trustee will continue to be responsible and in constant communication with Mr. Cutter and managing the assets. Ms. Alavi also stated that $900,000.00 will be invested, that the IRA in the conservatorship is already invested, that the conservatorship expenses are really high, that they are trying to generate enough income to pay for costs, and that the investments can be liquidated at any time without fees. Mr. Cutter stated that ETF investments do not have to pay capital gains. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
